name: 自出楼外北侧
description: 自出楼北侧空地，井边，红衣女子被红绳从二层窗口吊出的位置。案发现场之一。

visual.prompt: The north side of a traditional Chinese multi-story tower building (自出楼), with an old stone well in foreground, a red silk rope hanging from an upper window, autumn morning light, ominous atmosphere, early 1900s China manor

name: 内院
description: 祖家庄内院，包含北屋（书房/灵堂）、库房、自出楼一层（洞房）。核心案发区域。

visual.prompt: A traditional Chinese courtyard (内院) of a wealthy manor, with a study room converted to a mourning hall with white cloth draped over a table, a warehouse nearby, red wedding decorations mixed with funeral white, dim lighting, 1910s China

name: 前院
description: 祖家庄前院，昨晚酒席未撤，花轿停在墙边，正门旁有狗窝。漆鼻老狗出没。

visual.prompt: A traditional Chinese manor front courtyard with banquet tables still set from last night's feast, a red wedding sedan chair against a wall, an old dog kennel near the main gate, scattered autumn leaves, morning light, 1910s China

name: 中院
description: 祖家庄中院，有客房、空房、井。车夫老于在此出没。

visual.prompt: A middle courtyard of a traditional Chinese manor with guest rooms and a well, a horse-drawn carriage parked nearby, morning mist, quiet and tense atmosphere, 1910s China

name: 花园
description: 祖家庄花园，有假山，假山后有一处被砖堵住的墙洞。靠近内院墙边有隐藏的地窖门。

visual.prompt: A traditional Chinese garden within a manor, with a decorative rockery (假山), a partially hidden hole in the garden wall behind the rocks, autumn flowers, mysterious and secluded atmosphere, 1910s China

name: 后院
description: 祖家庄后院，有南屋（彩楠/显武住处）和东屋（银环住处）。

visual.prompt: A back courtyard of a traditional Chinese manor with two residential buildings facing each other, south room and east room, simple furnishings visible through windows, quiet domestic area, 1910s China

name: 地窖
description: 花园墙边隐藏的地窖，用铁锁锁住，里面藏有赃物和尸体。

visual.prompt: A hidden underground cellar entrance in a Chinese manor garden, with an old iron lock on wooden doors, dark stone steps leading down, cobwebs and dust, mysterious and foreboding, 1910s China
